if.test: category != null and category != '' and category != 'all'

choose.when:
AND ( TO_CHAR(p.POST_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
OR UPPER( 'POST-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(p.POST_ID), 3, '0') ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_POST ) AS "total",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_POST WHERE TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AS "today",
( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT POST_ID) FROM POST_REPORT ) AS "reportedPostCount",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'WAITING' ) AS "pendingReportCount"
FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.POST_ID AS "postId",
'POST-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(p.POST_ID), 3, '0') AS "postCode",
p.TITLE AS "title", LOWER(p.CATEGORY) AS "category", p.MEMBER_ID AS "author",
TO_CHAR( p.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS "createdAt",
NVL(p.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS "views", NVL(c.COMMENT_COUNT, 0) AS "comments",
NVL(a.IMAGE_COUNT, 0) AS "imageCount", NVL(a.FILE_COUNT, 0) AS "fileCount",
NVL(r.REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS "reportCount", NVL(r.PENDING_REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS "pendingReportCount",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC, p.POST_ID DESC ) AS RN
FROM COMMUNITY_POST p
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM POST_COMMENT GROUP BY POST_ID ) c ON c.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID,
SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(FILE_TYPE) = 'IMAGE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS IMAGE_COUNT,
SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(FILE_TYPE) = 'ATTACH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS FILE_COUNT
FROM POST_ATTACHMENT GROUP BY POST_ID ) a ON a.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS REPORT_COUNT,
SUM( CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS PENDING_REPORT_COUNT
FROM POST_REPORT GROUP BY POST_ID ) r ON r.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
)
WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'WAITING'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS report_id, r.POST_ID AS post_id, r.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, r.REASON AS reason,
r.CREATED_AT AS created_at,
TO_CHAR( r.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS created_at_text,
r.STATUS AS status,
p.TITLE AS post_title, LOWER(p.CATEGORY) AS post_category,
NVL(rc.POST_REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS post_report_count,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC, r.REPORT_ID DESC ) AS RN
FROM POST_REPORT r
JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.POST_ID = r.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS POST_REPORT_COUNT FROM POST_REPORT GROUP BY POST_ID ) rc ON rc.POST_ID = r.POST_ID
WHERE r.STATUS = 'WAITING' )
WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT p.POST_ID AS "postId",
'POST-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(p.POST_ID), 3, '0') AS "postCode",
p.TITLE AS "title", LOWER(p.CATEGORY) AS "category", p.MEMBER_ID AS "author", p.CONTENT AS "content",
TO_CHAR( p.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS "createdAt",
NVL(p.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS "views", NVL(c.COMMENT_COUNT, 0) AS "comments",
NVL(a.IMAGE_COUNT, 0) AS "imageCount", NVL(a.FILE_COUNT, 0) AS "fileCount",
NVL(r.REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS "reportCount", NVL(r.PENDING_REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS "pendingReportCount"
FROM COMMUNITY_POST p
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM POST_COMMENT GROUP BY POST_ID ) c ON c.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID,
SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(FILE_TYPE) = 'IMAGE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS IMAGE_COUNT,
SUM( CASE WHEN UPPER(FILE_TYPE) = 'ATTACH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS FILE_COUNT
FROM POST_ATTACHMENT GROUP BY POST_ID ) a ON a.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS REPORT_COUNT,
SUM( CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS PENDING_REPORT_COUNT
FROM POST_REPORT GROUP BY POST_ID ) r ON r.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
WHERE p.POST_ID = #{postId}

SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS report_id, r.POST_ID AS post_id, r.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, r.REASON AS reason,
r.CREATED_AT AS created_at,
TO_CHAR( r.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS created_at_text,
NVL(r.STATUS, 'WAITING') AS status,
h.ADMIN_MEMO AS admin_memo,
TO_CHAR( h.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS processed_at
FROM POST_REPORT r
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HISTORY_ID, REPORT_ID, TARGET_ID, ADMIN_MEMO, CREATED_AT
FROM ( SELECT mrh.*,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY mrh.REPORT_TYPE, mrh.REPORT_ID, mrh.TARGET_ID
ORDER BY mrh.CREATED_AT DESC, mrh.HISTORY_ID DESC ) AS RN
FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY mrh
WHERE mrh.REPORT_TYPE = 'POST' )
WHERE RN = 1 ) h ON h.REPORT_ID = r.REPORT_ID AND h.TARGET_ID = r.POST_ID
WHERE r.POST_ID = #{postId}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.CREATED_AT DESC, r.REPORT_ID DESC

SELECT ATTACH_ID AS attach_id, POST_ID AS post_id, FILE_NAME AS file_name, FILE_PATH AS file_path, FILE_SIZE AS file_size, FILE_TYPE AS file_type
FROM POST_ATTACHMENT
WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
ORDER BY ATTACH_ID
mapper.update: LOCK TABLE MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY IN EXCLUSIVE MODE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, TARGET_MEMBER_ID, REPORTER_MEMBER_ID, REPORT_TYPE, REPORT_ID, TARGET_ID, REASON, RESULT_STATUS, ADMIN_MEMO, CREATED_AT )
SELECT ( SELECT NVL(MAX(HISTORY_ID), 0) + 1 FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY ),
p.MEMBER_ID, r.MEMBER_ID, 'POST', r.REPORT_ID, r.POST_ID, r.REASON, #{resultStatus}, #{adminMemo}, SYSDATE
FROM POST_REPORT r
JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.POST_ID = r.POST_ID
WHERE r.POST_ID = #{postId} AND r.REPORT_ID = #{reportId} AND r.STATUS = #{resultStatus}
